name: L-Town
description: Open source multiplayer FPS browser game
compose:
name: slashnode-l-town
services:
  app:
    image: ghcr.io/besoeasy/l-town:20260621
    container_name: l-town
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:30300:30300
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
